title: schiedea diffusa subsp. macraei
intro: Schiedea diffusa subsp. macraei, also known as Mauna Kea schiedea, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, found only in Hawaii. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schiedea diffusa subsp. macraei include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can be made into teas, capsules, or topical creams for various health applications.
